leadText: The Wave Incense (Japanese: さざなみのおこう Wavelet Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is an incense that allows Mantine to produce Mantyke Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Mystic Water.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Mantine Egg , a Mantyke Egg is produced instead.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%.
